business.name: BEST 4 LESS HOME SOLUTIONS LLC
business.tagline: Quick fixes, fair prices, done right

hero.headline: The handyman Tampa calls *when it needs to work*
hero.subheadline: From toilets to wall patches, Marwan shows up early and gets it done. No hidden fees, no runaround — just honest work at honest prices.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every repair, every room
services_section.subheading: When something's broken, we make it work again

services.title: Toilet Installation & Repair
services.description: Complete toilet installs, leak fixes, and everything in between. Professional work that lasts.

services.title: Wall Patches & Touch-ups
services.description: Holes, cracks, and dings disappear. Clean patches that blend seamlessly with existing walls.

services.title: General Home Repairs
services.description: The catch-all for everything that's not working right. Six repairs in two hours? That's just Tuesday.

services.title: Quick Response Service
services.description: Call today, fixed today. Available through Nextdoor and direct contact for urgent repairs.

about.heading: Marwan gets it done
about.body: In Tampa, when something breaks, you call Marwan. Professional handyman service that shows up early, works clean, and charges what we quote. No surprises, no excuses — just solid repairs that stick. From single fixes to multi-item punch lists, we handle what needs handling.

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.text: Professional toilet installation, showed up 30 minutes early, fair pricing with no hidden fees. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Sherrie J.
reviews.text: Called through Nextdoor and they were at my house within an hour. Great work, very professional, reasonable prices.

reviews.name: Sony A.
reviews.text: Hard to find someone as knowledgeable and affordable. Took care of 6 things around my home in under 2 hours.

reviews.name: Matt Y.
reviews.text: Amazing work and customer service on multiple jobs. Will definitely be calling again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times across the region

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed?
cta.body: Call Marwan directly for fast, honest handyman service. Same-day repairs available, fair pricing guaranteed.
